info.english_meaning: to ooze to drip to trickle

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prasyandini' (gO॰Da॰2.7.42) prakfzwaM syandanaM varzaM prasyandaH tadvati kAla iti sUtrArTaH
'sa raTaM yuktvA sukanyArTaM SaryAtImupADAya prasizyanda' (Sa॰brA॰4.1.5.6) tatvare ityarTaH syado javo Bavati syandanaSca javano'nudGAtI raTaH
'pUrvamavivakzitasyArTasyAnantaraM svavAvaye samAropo nAwye'vasyanditamucyate' taTA ca darpaRakArastallakzaRamAha
'SamBumayoBUByAM vizyandayati' (kO0 sU0 43 3-12) AsiYcatItyarTaH mArutaM vizyandamAnaM (payaH) kvaTyamAnamityarTaH
'mArutaM vizyandamAnam' (dugDam) (E0 brA0 526) arTavESadyAya BUyo'sya nyAsaH vizyandamAnam UrDvamudgataM pAtrAd bahirviSezeRa syandanadaSApannam
'yasyAgnihotramaDiSritaM skandati vA vizyandate vA' (E0 brA0 75) vizyando nAma jalakzIrayoragnisaMyoge kzIramaDaH kurvan jalamupari ca kurvan vyApAraH (zaqguruSizyaH)
'yadi tvAmIdfSaM rAmaBadraH paSyettadAsya hfdayaM snehenABizyandeta' (uttara0 5) aBizyandeta dravet prasravet aBiraviSezakaH
'prAyeRa sarve nayanAmayAste BavantyaBizyandanimittamUlAH' (suSruta0 uttara0 62) nayanAByAM jalabindunipatanamaBizyandaH
'BUtapUrvamaBUtapUrvaM vA janapadaM paradeSApavAhanena svadeSABizyandavamanena vA niveSayet' (kO0 a0 211) aBizyando'tirekaH (prajAnAm)
'divAsvapnAt purovAtAd gurvaBizyandiBojanAt' (kA0 saM0 Kila0 sUtikopa0 Slo0 41) ukto'rTaH navaM DAnyamaBizyandi laGu saMvatsarozitam ityAyurvedavidaH aBizyandiramaRaM SAKAnagaramiti kozaH
